text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #2)
It took a bit longer than expected to get my development computer hooked up to the internet again, creating a bit of a backlog I'm working to have cleared up right now. I've got updates (almost) ready for several other ports I'm maintaining that just need some functional testing. Lilypond 2.20 will then be next on my plate.
